concept.description: Annotates compiled SaltMarcher view-layer types for the cockpit contribution MVVM harness.
concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type) WHERE type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\..*' WITH type, split(type.fqn, '.') AS segments SET type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType, type.viewBucket = CASE WHEN size(segments) >= 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND segments[5] CONTAINS 'DisplayModel' THEN 'MODEL' WHEN size(segments) >= 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND segments[5] CONTAINS 'ViewModel' THEN 'MODEL' WHEN size(segments) >= 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND segments[5] CONTAINS 'View' THEN 'VIEW' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND segments[4] CONTAINS 'Contribution' THEN 'CONTRIBUTION' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND segments[4] CONTAINS 'Binder' THEN 'BINDER' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND segments[4] CONTAINS 'ViewModel' THEN 'MODEL' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND segments[4] CONTAINS 'View' THEN 'VIEW' ELSE 'LEGACY' END, type.relativePath = CASE WHEN type.sourceFileName IS NULL OR type.sourceFileName = '' THEN replace(type.fqn, '.', '/') + '.java' WHEN type.name IS NULL OR type.name = '' OR NOT type.fqn ENDS WITH '.' + type.name THEN replace(type.fqn, '.', '/') + '.java' ELSE replace(substring(type.fqn, 0, size(type.fqn) - size(type.name) - 1), '.', '/') + '/' + type.sourceFileName END RETURN type AS MvvmViewType
MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE type.viewBucket = 'CONTRIBUTION' SET type:SaltMarcher:MvvmRootEntrypoint RETURN type AS MvvmRootEntrypoint

constraint.description: Cockpit MVVM topology allows active view Java only in active roots or slotcontent roots.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE type.viewBucket = 'LEGACY' RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, 'src/view/leftbartabs, src/view/statetabs, src/view/dropdowns, or src/view/slotcontent' AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Active view Java must use the cockpit contribution topology.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Component-local view buckets are migration debt and forbidden for active Java.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE type.viewBucket = 'LEGACY' RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, 'src/view/leftbartabs, src/view/statetabs, src/view/dropdowns, or src/view/slotcontent' AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Legacy component-local View/ViewModel/api/assembly-style topology is not active target code.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: View contributions are the only shell-facing view-layer entrypoints.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE type.viewBucket = 'CONTRIBUTION' AND NOT type.name CONTAINS '$' AND NOT type.name ENDS WITH 'Contribution' RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, '*Contribution' AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Each shell-facing view-layer entrypoint must be one contribution.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Each contribution, binder, or ViewModel source file owns exactly one top-level type.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE type.viewBucket IN ['CONTRIBUTION', 'BINDER', 'MODEL'] AND NOT type.name CONTAINS '$' WITH type.relativePath AS source, collect(DISTINCT type.name) AS typeNames WHERE size(typeNames) <> 1 RETURN source AS Source, 'exactly one top-level contribution, binder, or ViewModel type' AS ExpectedDirection, reduce(actual = '', typeName IN typeNames | CASE WHEN actual = '' THEN typeName ELSE actual + ', ' + typeName END) AS ActualDirection, 'A contribution, binder, or ViewModel file must define exactly one top-level type.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Passive panel views name their fixed shell surface.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType {viewBucket: 'VIEW'}) WHERE NOT type.name CONTAINS '$' AND NOT ( (type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.slotcontent\\..*' AND type.name ENDS WITH 'View') OR (type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.leftbartabs\\.[^.]+\\..*' AND (type.name ENDS WITH 'ControlsView' OR type.name ENDS WITH 'MainView' OR type.name ENDS WITH 'StateView')) OR (type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.dropdowns\\.[^.]+\\..*' AND type.name ENDS WITH 'TopBarView') OR (type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.statetabs\\.[^.]+\\..*' AND type.name ENDS WITH 'StateView') ) RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, 'area-specific passive view suffix: leftbartabs use *ControlsView/*MainView/*StateView, dropdowns use *TopBarView, statetabs use *StateView, slotcontent uses *View' AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Passive view names must identify the shell surface they render.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Each passive view source file owns exactly one top-level panel fragment.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType {viewBucket: 'VIEW'}) WHERE NOT type.name CONTAINS '$' WITH type.relativePath AS source, collect(DISTINCT type.name) AS typeNames WHERE size(typeNames) <> 1 RETURN source AS Source, 'exactly one top-level passive panel view type' AS ExpectedDirection, reduce(actual = '', typeName IN typeNames | CASE WHEN actual = '' THEN typeName ELSE actual + ', ' + typeName END) AS ActualDirection, 'A passive view file must define exactly one panel fragment.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: At least one shell contribution must exist.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (root:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmRootEntrypoint) WITH count(root) AS rootCount WHERE rootCount = 0 RETURN 'src/view/leftbartabs, src/view/statetabs, or shell-discovered src/view/dropdowns' AS Source, 'at least one shell contribution' AS ExpectedDirection, 'none' AS ActualDirection, 'The shell needs discoverable contributions.' AS Details

constraint.description: Every binder structurally wires its co-located ViewModel and at least one passive slot surface.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType {viewBucket: 'BINDER'}) WHERE NOT source.name CONTAINS '$' WITH source, split(source.fqn, '.') AS sourceSegments OPTIONAL MATCH (source)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(model:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType {viewBucket: 'MODEL'}) WITH source, sourceSegments, collect(DISTINCT model) AS modelCandidates WITH source, sourceSegments, [ model IN modelCandidates WHERE model IS NOT NULL AND NOT model.name CONTAINS '$' AND size(sourceSegments) >= 4 AND size(split(model.fqn, '.')) >= 4 AND split(model.fqn, '.')[2] = sourceSegments[2] AND split(model.fqn, '.')[3] = sourceSegments[3] ] AS ownModels OPTIONAL MATCH (source)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(slotSurface:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType {viewBucket: 'VIEW'}) WITH source, size(ownModels) AS ownModelCount, collect(DISTINCT slotSurface) AS slotSurfaceCandidates WITH source, ownModelCount, [ slotSurface IN slotSurfaceCandidates WHERE slotSurface IS NOT NULL AND NOT slotSurface.name CONTAINS '$' AND size(split(slotSurface.fqn, '.')) >= 4 AND ( ( split(slotSurface.fqn, '.')[2] = split(source.fqn, '.')[2] AND split(slotSurface.fqn, '.')[3] = split(source.fqn, '.')[3] ) OR split(slotSurface.fqn, '.')[2] = 'slotcontent' ) ] AS slotSurfaces WITH source, ownModelCount, size(slotSurfaces) AS slotSurfaceCount WHERE ownModelCount = 0 OR slotSurfaceCount = 0 RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, 'direct dependency on the co-located ViewModel and at least one active-root or slotcontent passive View' AS ExpectedDirection, CASE WHEN ownModelCount = 0 AND slotSurfaceCount = 0 THEN 'missing co-located ViewModel and passive slot-surface dependency' WHEN ownModelCount = 0 THEN 'missing co-located ViewModel dependency' ELSE 'missing passive slot-surface dependency' END AS ActualDirection, 'Binders must instantiate and bind their model and slot surfaces.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Passive panel views depend only on same-root or reusable passive views.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WITH source, target, split(source.fqn, '.') AS sourceSegments, split(target.fqn, '.') AS targetSegments WHERE source.viewBucket = 'VIEW' AND ( target.viewBucket <> 'VIEW' AND NOT ( source.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.slotcontent\\..*' AND target.viewBucket = 'MODEL' AND target.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.slotcontent\\..*' AND size(sourceSegments) >= 5 AND size(targetSegments) >= 5 AND sourceSegments[2] = targetSegments[2] AND sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] AND sourceSegments[4] = targetSegments[4] ) OR ( target.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.(leftbartabs|statetabs|dropdowns)\\..*' AND NOT ( size(sourceSegments) >= 4 AND size(targetSegments) >= 4 AND sourceSegments[2] = targetSegments[2] AND sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] ) ) OR ( source.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.slotcontent\\..*' AND target.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.slotcontent\\..*' AND NOT ( size(sourceSegments) >= 5 AND size(targetSegments) >= 5 AND sourceSegments[2] = targetSegments[2] AND sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] AND sourceSegments[4] = targetSegments[4] ) ) ) RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS Target, 'passive views may depend only on same-root passive views or slotcontent passive views' AS ExpectedDirection, source.fqn + ' -> ' + target.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Passive views must remain shell-free, domain-free, ViewModel-free, and foreign-view-root-free.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target

constraint.description: Contributions stay thin shell adapters; binders own slot wiring and domain service lookup.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type) WHERE source.viewBucket IN ['CONTRIBUTION', 'BINDER'] WITH source, target, split(source.fqn, '.') AS sourceSegments, split(target.fqn, '.') AS targetSegments WHERE target.fqn =~ 'bootstrap\\..*' OR target.fqn =~ 'src\\.data\\..*' OR target.fqn =~ 'shell\\.host\\..*' OR (target.fqn =~ 'shell\\..*' AND NOT target.fqn =~ 'shell\\.api\\..*') OR ( source.viewBucket = 'CONTRIBUTION' AND target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\..*' ) OR ( source.viewBucket = 'BINDER' AND target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\..*' AND NOT target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.[^.]+ApplicationService(\\$.*)?' AND NOT target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.published\\..+' ) OR ( target.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\..*' AND ( NOT (target.viewBucket IN ['CONTRIBUTION', 'BINDER', 'MODEL', 'VIEW']) OR ( source.viewBucket = 'CONTRIBUTION' AND NOT ( size(sourceSegments) >= 4 AND size(targetSegments) >= 4 AND sourceSegments[2] = targetSegments[2] AND sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] AND target.viewBucket IN ['CONTRIBUTION', 'BINDER'] ) ) OR ( source.viewBucket = 'BINDER' AND NOT ( ( size(sourceSegments) >= 4 AND size(targetSegments) >= 4 AND sourceSegments[2] = targetSegments[2] AND sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] AND target.viewBucket IN ['BINDER', 'MODEL', 'VIEW'] ) OR ( size(targetSegments) >= 6 AND targetSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND target.viewBucket IN ['MODEL', 'VIEW'] ) ) ) ) ) RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS Target, 'contributions may depend only on shell.api and their Binder; binders may depend on shell.api, same-root ViewModels/Views, slotcontent, and domain public boundaries' AS ExpectedDirection, source.fqn + ' -> ' + target.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'View active roots must not depend on old topology, data, bootstrap, shell internals, or the wrong MVVM role.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target

constraint.description: ViewModels stay independent from shell APIs and concrete views.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType {viewBucket: 'MODEL'})-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type) WITH source, target, split(source.fqn, '.') AS sourceSegments, split(target.fqn, '.') AS targetSegments WHERE target.fqn =~ 'bootstrap\\..*' OR target.fqn =~ 'src\\.data\\..*' OR target.fqn =~ 'shell\\..*' OR ( target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\..*' AND ( ( size(sourceSegments) >= 3 AND sourceSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND NOT target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.published\\..+' ) OR ( ( size(sourceSegments) < 3 OR sourceSegments[2] <> 'slotcontent' ) AND NOT target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.[^.]+ApplicationService(\\$.*)?' AND NOT target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.published\\..+' ) ) ) OR ( target.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\..*' AND ( NOT (target.viewBucket = 'MODEL') OR NOT ( ( size(sourceSegments) >= 4 AND size(targetSegments) >= 4 AND sourceSegments[2] = targetSegments[2] AND sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] AND ( sourceSegments[2] <> 'slotcontent' OR ( size(sourceSegments) >= 5 AND size(targetSegments) >= 5 AND sourceSegments[4] = targetSegments[4] ) ) ) OR ( size(targetSegments) >= 6 AND targetSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND targetSegments[5] CONTAINS 'DisplayModel' ) ) ) ) RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS Target, 'JavaFX bindable state, same-root ViewModels, active-root domain services, and domain published carriers only' AS ExpectedDirection, source.fqn + ' -> ' + target.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'ViewModels must not depend on shell APIs, concrete views, data, bootstrap, or domain internals.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target
